case_title: CHRISTIAN REPIZO VS. MSK INVESTMENTS, LP

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *(REFUSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD)* COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MSK INVESTMENTS, LP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2011 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO NOV-14-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIP TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUE FOR JUDGE MITCHELL TO HEAR CASE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REPIZO, CHRISTIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MSK INVESTMENTS, LP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$60.00) SERVED SEP-02-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MSK INVESTMENTS, LP
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MSK INVESTMENTS, LP
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF REPIZO, CHRISTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT MSK INVESTMENTS, LP
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY REPIZO, CHRISTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT MSK INVESTMENTS, LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2011 - JUDGMENT.
